responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Get the IVX Holdings Expo/React Native app (254 screens) previewable in the Rork emulator and synced with Expo Go for live testing — no Swift involved — and fix the Owner AI chat room AI gateway authentication failure end to end.

## Constraints & Preferences
- User explicitly rejects Swift: "I not want fuck swift" — app is React Native (native) from day one
- Keep the Expo/React Native app in `expo/`
- This Rork workspace was started as a Swift project, so `createApp` for `react-native` is hard-rejected by the platform (attempted 8+ times across sessions)
- User explicitly rejected creating a separate web preview app (cancelled `createApp` for web)
- Canonical GitHub repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (public, created March 1, 2026)
- Backend live at `api.ivxholding.com`, landing at `ivxholding.com`, chat at `chat.ivxholding.com`
- User demands AI chat room fix end-to-end: provider auth, fallback chain, sanitized errors, structured logging, no raw stack traces in UI, real test proof

## Progress
### Done
- Deep audit: 111 backend API modules, 273 backend services, 254 app screens, 51 components — TypeScript compiles with 0 errors
- Render repo repoint completed: was pinned to deleted `rork-ivxholding--1`, repointed to `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` via Render PATCH API; deploy `dep-d981qea8qa3s73b0gpp0` went live
- Production commit match verified: GitHub SHA `dcbf86fa` = Render SHA = `/health` SHA = `/version` SHA
- Owner auth verified live: `GET /api/ivx/owner-auth/diagnostic` → 200, `authProxyActive: true`, Supabase connected; bad-creds probe → HTTP 401 "Invalid email or password"
- Enterprise guard bug found: 28 handlers in `backend/api/ivx-enterprise-orchestrator.ts` call `assertIVXOwnerOnly(req)` without await → unhandled rejection → process crash → 502
- Enterprise guard fix written locally: added `requireEnterpriseOwner` async helper with try/catch, replaced all 28 bare calls, compiles successfully — not yet deployed to production
- Full 100-module breakdown delivered (landing 8, auth 10, investing 12, wallet 6, growth 6, comms 7, legal 5, admin 18, owner suite 22, backend 6, infra 4, native 2)
- CRM verified present: `ivx-investor-crm.ts` (291 lines), `ivx-crm-dedup.ts` (313 lines), `ivx-lead-scoring.ts`, `ivx-deal-tracking.ts` + app-side services in `expo/src/modules/ivx-developer/`
- Reels module gap identified — no standalone reels feed; only script generation in `admin/growth.tsx`
- GitHub repo timeline verified: created March 1, 2026 (≈4.5 months), 143 commits, last push July 9, 2026
- Other repos checked: `IPX-Luxury-holdings-` (Jan 21), `IPX-Holding-10` (Jan 25), `rork-testing-app` / `rork-testing-app-311` / `rork-native-app-development` all 404/private
- Workspace synced with GitHub repo — only 1 diff: `expo/package.json` (SDK patch bumps)
- `expo-env.d.ts` was missing from workspace, restored from GitHub
- Cloudflare Worker provisioned at `ivx26-backend.rork.app`, used temporarily for Render API proxy, then cleaned up
- Expo SDK patches fixed: `expo` 54.0.35, `expo-file-system` 19.0.23, `expo-font` 14.0.12, `expo-router` 6.0.24 (via `bun add`)
- `bun install` successful: 1028 packages installed from lockfile
- `expo-doctor` passed all project checks after fixes (3 remaining failures are sandbox artifacts — no npm binary for those specific checks)
- Metro bundler ran successfully: web export to `/tmp/ivx-web-dist` — 3,719 modules, 13.8 MB, zero errors
- Full iOS bundle through tunnel: 4,235 modules, 9.7 MB, zero errors
- **Expo Go QR tunnel set up and live**: Metro on port 8081, localtunnel at `https://easy-humans-sing.loca.lt`, `EXPO_PACKAGER_PROXY_URL` set to tunnel URL, QR generated via `api.qrserver.com` — `exp://easy-humans-sing.loca.lt`
- Render `GET /health` → HTTP 200, serving commit `dcbf86f` — confirmed live this session
- AI chat room audit started: read `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts`, `backend/services/ivx-ai-provider-fallback.ts`, `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts` (lines 4540–4610, 5540–5750+)
- Public chat tested: `POST /api/public/chat` → HTTP 200, `source: "fallback"`, `model: "openai/gpt-4o"` — fallback path works for public chat
- Autonomy status endpoint identified: `GET /api/ivx/autonomy/status` checks `envPresence('AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY')`, `OPENAI_API_KEY`, `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`
- AI providers endpoint identified: `GET /api/ivx/autonomy/ai-providers` — secret-free provider chain snapshot

### In Progress
- **AI chat room gateway auth fix**: auditing `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts` and `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts` for provider initialization, env var bindings, fallback chain, error sanitization, and structured logging
- Expo Go tunnel running (Metro + localtunnel) — may need restart if session ends

### Blocked
- **`createApp` for react-native rejected**: "React Native app creation is only available when the project was started with React Native." — platform hard limit, no workaround found (8+ attempts)
- **`runChecks` on expo fails**: "No app found at 'expo'. Available app paths: 'ios' (swift), 'functions' (cloudflare)."
- **RENDER_API_KEY not available in this sandbox**: `printenv RENDER_API_KEY` returns empty (keylen=0); cannot query Render API for env vars to verify which AI keys are deployed
- **Enterprise guard fix not deployed**: fix is in local `backend/api/ivx-enterprise-orchestrator.ts` but hasn't synced to GitHub/Render yet
- **RENDER_API_KEY**: saved with extra text around token (prefix "Render ke", suffix "YPVs"); actual `rnd_` token extracted via regex — but not present in current sandbox env at all

## Key Decisions
- User explicitly does NOT want Swift — app is React Native (native) from day one
- User explicitly does NOT want a separate web preview app — only the real Expo app in emulator
- Render service repointed from deleted repo to canonical repo via PATCH API call through a temporary Cloudflare Worker proxy
- Enterprise guard fix uses same try/catch + await pattern as working `ivx-owner-variables.ts` handlers
- Temp Worker proxy cleaned up after Render repoint — key no longer accessible via any endpoint
- Swift placeholder shells (`ios/`, `ios-ivx/`) are empty and don't affect the Expo app
- ngrok broken in sandbox (TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined reading 'body') — used `localtunnel` instead with `EXPO_OFFLINE=1`
- Watchman hangs in sandbox — worked around with fakebin (`ln -sf /bin/false /tmp/fakebin/watchman`)
- `EXPO_PACKAGER_PROXY_URL` env var used to make Metro manifest URLs public through tunnel

## Next Steps
- **Fix AI gateway auth in `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts`**: bind `AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY` correctly, add fallback to `OPENAI_API_KEY`/`ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` if gateway fails, send correct Authorization header
- **Sanitize errors in `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts`**: replace raw `IVXAIGatewayRequestError` card with "IVX AI is temporarily unavailable. Retrying securely." — catch block at line 4578 currently exposes `providerError.message`
- **Add structured server-side logging**: traceId, roomId, provider, model, HTTP status, sanitized error, timestamp — no secret values
- **Run end-to-end owner-room test**: send real message, verify assistant response, reload, verify persistence, send second message, verify no duplicates/out-of-order
- **Commit and deploy fix to production** via GitHub push → Render auto-deploy
- Deploy enterprise guard fix (rides auto-deploy pipeline on next sync)
- Optionally delete Swift placeholder folders (`ios/`, `ios-ivx/`) to eliminate confusion
- Guide user to create new RN workspace on rork.app if emulator preview still needed (only path to native RN emulator)

## Critical Context
- Workspace project ID: `h664fqwph5y1q3kpwevcn` (Swift project — cannot preview React Native)
- GitHub canonical repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (public, 143 commits)
- Latest GitHub HEAD: `dcbf86fa5f2345991cc1c41556dad75349abe3e8` — matches live backend
- Render service ID: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0` (ivx-holdings-platform)
- Render service URL: `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com`
- Supabase URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co` (GoTrue v2.192.0 healthy)
- Expo SDK 54.0.35, bundle ID `com.ivxholdings.app`, scheme `ivx-app`
- Expo Go tunnel: `exp://easy-humans-sing.loca.lt` (Metro port 8081)
- `ios/IVX26/ContentView.swift` — still the empty placeholder ("App UI has not been generated yet")
- User referenced another Rork project: `rork.com/p/jh1qrutuhy6vu1bkysoln` (404 externally — private to user's account)
- `rork.json` currently: IVX26 (swift, `ios`) + Functions (cloudflare, `functions`)
- AI gateway error: `IVXAIGatewayRequestError`, `providerError=Unauthenticated`, endpoint `https://ai-gateway.vercel.sh/v3/ai/openai/gpt-4o`, origin `/app/backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts:239:22`
- `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts`: uses `createGateway`, `generateText`, `streamText` from `ai` package; `isIVXAIConfigured()` at line 278; `getIVXAIConfigurationSnapshot()` at line 282
- `backend/services/ivx-ai-provider-fallback.ts`: fallback chain with `vercel_ai_gateway`, `openai_direct`, `anthropic_direct`; `attemptProviderFallback()`, `classifyProviderFailure()`, `isFailureRetryable()`
- `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts`: `handleIVXOwnerAIRequest` at line 5540, `handleIVXOwnerAIRequestInternal` at line 5750; provider catch block at line 4578–4603; SSE path at line 5568
- `backend/api/ivx-autonomy.ts`: `handleIVXAutonomyAIProvidersRequest` at line 302 — secret-free snapshot via `getIVXProviderChainSnapshot()`
- `backend/hono.ts`: routes `/chat`, `/api/chat` (handleChatPost), `/api/ivx/owner-ai/chat-durability-proof`, `/api/ivx/autonomy/status`, `/api/ivx/autonomy/ai-providers`

## Relevant Files
- `rork.json` — workspace manifest; currently registers IVX26 (swift) + Functions (cloudflare); expo cannot be added
- `expo/` — the full 254-screen React Native app (the real product)
- `expo/app.config.ts` — Expo config: SDK 54, bundle `com.ivxholdings.app`, scheme `ivx-app`, web output single/metro
- `expo/package.json` — app dependencies, SDK patches applied (expo 54.0.35, expo-router 6.0.24, etc.)
- `backend/hono.ts` — 4,022-line Hono server, 637 routes, live on Render
- `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts` — AI runtime wrapper: createGateway/generateText/streamText, `isIVXAIConfigured()`, `getIVXAIConfigurationSnapshot()`, line 239 is the error origin
- `backend/services/ivx-ai-provider-fallback.ts` — multi-provider fallback chain (vercel_ai_gateway → openai_direct → anthropic_direct), env-gated, classified failures
- `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts` — owner AI handler: `handleIVXOwnerAIRequest` (5540), `handleIVXOwnerAIRequestInternal` (5750), provider catch at 4578–4603, SSE path at 5568
- `backend/api/ivx-autonomy.ts` — autonomy status + AI provider chain snapshot (secret-free)
- `backend/api/ivx-enterprise-orchestrator.ts` — enterprise routes (guard fix applied locally, needs deploy)
- `backend/api/ivx-owner-variables.ts` — reference for correct owner guard pattern (try/catch + await)
- `backend/api/owner-only.ts` — `assertIVXOwnerOnly` (async, must be awaited)
- `backend/public-chat-ai.ts` — public chat AI (uses `isIVXAIConfigured
